sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Bangzahin ka lungnop, mi honpi’ aw ka za,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua mun va beel ciat ni, Ama min phat ding
Lungdamna la ngai ding pai ni.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua ah David Topa’n, A kumpi tokhom
Mi siangte lungdam ding, mawhnei mite dah

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Lungnopna hong tung hen, Lungdamna’n hong
Mi khempeuh in thupha ngah in;
Topa’ nopna sang hen, A pha deihna khangin,
zawh loh thupha hong tung hen.
